channel.title: Huang Xu | Robotics Engineer
channel.description: Recent content on Huang Xu | Robotics Engineer

item.title: About Me
item.description:
Hello! I am Huang Xu. I am currently focused on bio-inspired underwater robotics, reinforcement learning for motion control, and Sim2real transfer. I am passionate about building full-stack robotics systems, from low-level embedded control and hardware integration to high-level intelligent algorithms, ensuring seamless deployment in real-world environments.

Technical Stack

  • Programming: C, C++ ,Python(Ros, PyTorch)
  • Embedded: ESP32, Arduino, CAN, servo
  • Control: PID, MPC, Reforcement Learning

Contact

  • GitHub: github.com/Axu991
  • Email: [huangxu2024@shanghaitech.edu.cn]
  • Location: Shanghai / Shanghaitech University / Model-free Autonomous Agent and Intelligent Control (MAgIC) Lab
